# The SEO Rulebook (auto-generated, self-updating)

Corpus: **23979** graded pages · authority-controlled band n = 154 top-3 / 368 challengers. Regenerated every run; verified verdicts come from the audit.

> **No entry is a proven RULE yet.** LEAD = survives authority control (audit-verified or significant). CONFOUND = vanishes at equal authority. WATCH = right direction, not yet significant. GATE = flat floor. A lead becomes a rule only after a controlled live test moves a real page — see [[experiments]].

**Audit-verified leads: 2 · candidates to watch: 5 · confounds ruled out: 8.**

| Factor | Verdict | Basis | Raw gap | Controlled gap | n | If real, do this |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Internal links to the page | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 2.0 | 5.0 | 154 | Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site. |
| Query in lead paragraph | **LEAD** | high | 9% | 11% | 154 | Use the query in the opening lines. |
| Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for) | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 7.0 | 19 | 137 | Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term. |
| Contextual (in-content) internal links | **WATCH** | low | -2.5 | 0.0 | 3 | Add internal links from inside the body content (not nav/footer) — the evidence says contextual links carry the value, not raw count. |
| Has FAQ schema | **WATCH** | low | 1% | 4% | 154 | Add an FAQ block with schema. |
| Has freshness date | **WATCH** | low | 5% | 3% | 154 | Show a published/updated date. |
| Lists (ul/ol) | **WATCH** | low | 1.0 | 1.0 | 154 | Add structured lists. |
| Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe) | **WATCH** | audit-verified | 6% | -4% | 154 | Trim/expand the title into the 40-60 character band. |
| Page speed (mobile LCP) | **GATE** | audit-verified | 314.8 | -841.8 | 20 | — |
| E-E-A-T score | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0.0 | 154 | — |
| Exact query in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 9% | 12% | 154 | — |
| Freshness (page age, days) | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | -5 | 10 | 85 | — |
| Has author / byline | **CONFOUND** | high | 0% | 12% | 154 | — |
| Keyword density /1k | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0.0 | 134 | — |
| Query front-loaded in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 6% | 4% | 154 | — |
| Stat / $ density | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0.0 | 154 | — |
| Word count / depth | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 49.0 | 25.5 | 154 | — |

## The playbook (confirmed leads first — these are what to test live)

1. **Internal links to the page** — Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site.
2. **Query in lead paragraph** — Use the query in the opening lines.
3. **Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for)** — Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term.

**Watch list (promising, need more data or an audit):** Contextual (in-content) internal links, Has FAQ schema, Has freshness date, Lists (ul/ol), Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe).

_The authoritative verdicts are set by the six-skeptic `verify-page1-leads` audit and recorded in VERIFIED here + [[findings-log]]. This screen surfaces new candidates between audits._
